mission: Open-source, low-cost, humanitarian demining drone. Built by a solo maker on a Huawei Y7a using Termux.
philosophy: Building is a trace. The rest is commentary.
location_focus: Bosnia and Herzegovina (simulation), extendable to Sudan (post-conflict)

large_metal_mines_bosnia_realistic.scenario: 8 large mines (TMA-3/5, TMRP-6, 82mm/120mm mortars) along frontline cluster
large_metal_mines_bosnia_realistic.note: 2 FN likely due to spatial clustering (mines at distance <2 cells)

all_12_balkan_targets_controlled.note: 3 FN are plastic AP mines (PMA-1/2/3) undetectable by Mag/GPR at winter conditions

plastic_mines_reality.detection: Failed – 0% recall for PMA-2 in realistic Bosnia survey
plastic_mines_reality.reason: Magnetic moment too low (0.003 A·m²), GPR contrast too weak (score ~0.3 < threshold 0.7), depth >5cm excludes HSI
plastic_mines_reality.path_forward: Lower GPR threshold to 0.3, lower Vibro threshold to 0.2, accept higher FP (20-30/ha)

key_breakthroughs: v4.0: Abandoned probabilistic grid fusion → peak-based spatial voting
v4.6: Mag/HSI solo detection privilege + ≥2 rule for others
v6.1: Realistic GPR model using NanoVNA+Vivaldi specs
v7.3: Point-target GPR (eliminated 837→6 false peaks), Precision crossed 50%
v8.1: Realistic Bosnia frontline simulation validated system for large mines

gpr_nanovna.strength: Detects metal up to 30cm with SNR>35dB
gpr_nanovna.weakness: Plastic contrast too low (<0.3), threshold 0.7 drops them

thermal.weakness: Winter Bosnia has low dT/dt (~1°C/h max)

vibrometry.weakness: High noise floor, needs ≥2 agreement rule

january_2024.result: Identical to July (thermal contrast too weak to matter)

july_2024.result: Identical to January (system bottleneck is GPR/Mag thresholds, not thermal)

ethical_position.sudan_viability: Technically capable, but deployment must await conflict resolution and UNMAS coordination
ethical_position.prohibited_use: Military, offensive, or any non-humanitarian application

next_steps: Lower GPR threshold to 0.3 for plastic mine recovery (accept FP increase)
Acquire July soil moisture data (wetter soil → worse GPR)
Field-test vibrometry payload on surrogate mine lane
Integrate real NanoVNA data into simulation pipeline
Build community documentation and welcome contributors
